settings.title: Launch your next best-selling device edit
settings.text: Merchandise headline products with richer storytelling, service cues, and curated category paths that feel more premium from the first scroll.

settings.subheading: Merchandise promotions without looking discount-bin generic
settings.title: Create polished moments for collections, capsules, and weekend drops
settings.text: Each slide now supports layered copy, secondary actions, proof points, and a configurable overlay treatment for more deliberate campaign design.

settings.heading: A more intentional homepage system for premium catalogs
settings.description: The slideshow, trust row, and category discovery sections now ship with stronger visual hierarchy and merchant controls so the default preset feels closer to a theme-store candidate.

settings.title: Fast shipping promises
settings.text: Highlight delivery windows, local pickup, or region-specific logistics without using vague filler copy.

settings.title: Purchase protection
settings.text: Surface warranties, secure checkout messaging, and post-purchase reassurance in a more polished card layout.

settings.title: Support that feels credible
settings.text: Give merchants room to explain response times, setup help, or guided shopping instead of a bare icon-and-label row.

settings.title: Flexible payment options
settings.text: Use the fourth card for installment messaging, trade-in programs, or store-credit offers tied to your catalog.

settings.heading: Trust cues that feel considered, not ornamental
settings.description: These cards support more specific operational and service messaging so merchants can match the nuance of their offer.
